  4. CRBN 2X Power Series

CRBN

CRBN 2X Power Series

Wider X Series alternative for players who want power, spin, and a bigger sweet spot.

A more forgiving power-series shape than a blade; useful for doubles players who need quick blocks and stable counters.

TypeAll-court
Shapewidebody
CorePolypropylene honeycomb
FaceRaw carbon fiber with power layer
Reference price$229.99
Price noteOfficial CRBN X Series pricing / verify variant
Level3.0, 3.5, 4.0, 4.5
TraitsForgiveness, Spin, Quick hands, Power
Used by / lineCRBN pro/team users vary by season
Official product page

Prices, sponsors, rankings, DUPR, and product availability change. Verify on the linked official source before publishing buying advice.

Prices, specs, and approved-equipment status can change. Treat this as a research dashboard and verify official retailer and equipment-list pages before purchase.

Play profile

Power8.6
Control8.0
Spin8.8
Forgiveness8.6
Hand speed8.2

Scores are editorial comparison notes based on product positioning and common review signals; they are not lab measurements.

How the 2X Power Series plays

The CRBN 2X Power Series is a balanced all-court paddle. On our 0–10 comparison scale its strongest traits are spin and power. Its widebody shape gives a large, forgiving sweet spot that is easy to control.

It is aimed at 3.0–4.5 players, and it is forgiving enough for improvers still grooving their swing. It trades a little touch for its other strengths. It sits in the premium price tier — confirm the current price at the source before buying. It is part of the CRBN pro/team users vary by season.
